---
title: "Publications"
categories: [Bioinformatics, Publication, CADD]
subtitle: "List of publications of GLB Instructors"
image: "image.jpg"
---
<div style="text-align: justify;">

## Peer-reviewed

1.  Ahmed SF, Barua P, Amin MA, Tabassum R, Haque MME, Islam L, Hossain MS, Verma AK. Cheminformatics-based analysis identified Novel compounds from *Nelumbo nucifera* as potential inhibitors targeting PI3k/Akt/mTOR Pathway of HR+/HER2- subtype for Breast Cancer. Biochemical and Biophysical Research Communications. 2025; doi: <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.bbrc.2025.152953>

2.  Islam L, Sarker H, Amin MA, Tabassum R, Nandi A, Islam T, Patwary MA, Ibnat F, Ahmed F, Siddiquee NH. Microbial biomolecule-driven identification of next-gen GSK-3β inhibitors for brain disorders. Computational Biology and Chemistry. 2025; doi: <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compbiolchem.2025.108860>

3. Siddiquee NH, Sujan MSI, Dremit TI, Rahat EH, Barman K, Karim M, Nandi C, Akter S, Talukder MEK, Hosen MS, Khaled M, Saha O, et al. Natural Products in Precision Neurological Disease (Cryptococcal Meningitis): Structure-Based Phytochemical Screening of *Glycyrrhiza glabra* Plant Against *Cryptococcus neoformans* Farnesyltransferase (FTase). Chemistry & Biodiversity. 2024; doi: <https://doi.org/10.1002/cbdv.202401987>

## Conference

### Poster Presentations

1. Tabassum, R., Nandi, C., Amin MA, Haque, M.E., Haq, M.A., Uddin, M.N., Islam, A., & Rahman, N., Bioactivity Assessment of Phytochemicals from *Crateva religiosa* against *Aedes aegypti* with Insights into their Mode of Action via Computational Analysis*, 39th Annual Bangladesh Society for Microbiology (BSM) Conference, One Health and Microbiome category 


2. Amin MA, Tabassum, R., Haque MME, Nandi C, & Islam, Dr. Md. R. (2025). Cheminformatics-based analysis identified compounds as inhibitor of ACE2 receptor by interacting with seaweed metabolites. 2nd ISCB RSG Bangladesh CompBio Symposium 2025. <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.14891694>
